text:
https://www.freebsd.org/usergroups.html#north-america

FreeBSD user group not listed here


  A URL : https://www.orlandobsd.org/

  An email contact address: David Billsbrough <kc4zvw@orlando220.org>

  A short description of the user group:

  A small BSD user group from the greater Orlando area in central Florida.  We are a group of computer hobbyists, I/T professionals, and Makerspace enthusiasts.
